.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a glob pattern for web-related files instead of a global setting, allowing specific indentation rules for TypeScript, JavaScript, and other web assets.
.editorconfig.before:
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

[{package,bower}.json]
indent_size = 2
.editorconfig.after:
# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

[*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}]
indent_size = 2

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.before:
* text eol=lf
*.java text
*.js text
*.css text
*.html text
*.png binary
*.jpg binary
*.jar binary
*.pdf binary
*.eot binary
*.ttf binary
*.gzip binary
*.gz binary
*.ai binary
*.eps binary
*.swf binary
.gitattributes.after:
* text=auto
*.bat text eol=crlf
*.cmd text eol=crlf
*.ps1 text eol=crlf
*.coffee text
*.css text
*.cql text
*.df text
*.ejs text
*.html text
*.java text
*.js text
*.json text
*.less text
*.properties text
*.sass text
*.scss text
*.sh text eol=lf
*.sql text
*.txt text
*.ts text
*.xml text
*.yaml text
*.yml text
*.doc diff=astextplain
*.DOC diff=astextplain
*.docx diff=astextplain
*.DOCX diff=astextplain
*.dot diff=astextplain
*.DOT diff=astextplain
*.pdf diff=astextplain
*.PDF diff=astextplain
*.rtf diff=astextplain
*.RTF diff=astextplain
*.markdown text
*.md text
*.adoc text
*.textile text
*.mustache text
*.csv text
*.tab text
*.tsv text
*.txt text
AUTHORS text
CHANGELOG text
CHANGES text
CONTRIBUTING text
COPYING text
copyright text
*COPYRIGHT* text
INSTALL text
license text
LICENSE text
NEWS text
readme text

TODO text
*.png binary

.eslintrc text

.jshintignore text
.stylelintrc text

.editorconfig text
.gitattributes text
.gitconfig text

Procfile text

package.json.general_idea: Rename project metadata to reflect the new application identity.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for CI/CD, Docker management, and frontend/backend workflows.
Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend stack.
Add ESLint and Prettier for code linting and formatting.
Add Husky and lint-staged for pre-commit hooks.
Add Protractor and WebDriver Manager for end-to-end testing.
Add configuration for Jest SonarQube reporting.
Add cache directories configuration for npm.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are deprecated and replaced by Spring Cloud Binders or native cloud support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Connectors are deprecated and may not be compatible with newer Spring Boot versions or cloud platforms, causing runtime binding failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Spark metrics reporter with Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern observability.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spark metrics reporter is outdated; Micrometer is the standard for Spring Boot 2.x metrics, ensuring compatibility with modern monitoring stacks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArchUnit dependencies for architectural testing with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: ArchUnit requires explicit dependencies for JUnit 5 integration; without them, architectural tests will fail to run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error responses.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for better error handling, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for testing, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Test dependency for testing utilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for testing, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Dropwizard Metrics Core dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for metrics, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JUnit Vintage Engine exclusion from Spring Boot Starter Test.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit Vintage Engine is no longer needed if the project has migrated to JUnit 5; keeping it can cause conflicts or unnecessary overhead.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Tomcat starter exclusion from Spring Boot Starter Web.
pom.xml.why_exists: The exclusion was likely specific to an older setup; removing it allows default embedded server configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jib Maven Plugin for container image building.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for containerization, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle Maven Plugin for code style enforcement.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for code quality, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Javadoc Maven Plugin for documentation generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for documentation, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Failsafe Maven Plugin for integration testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for testing, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add IDEA Maven Plugin for IntelliJ IDEA project generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for IDE support, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Resources Maven Plugin for resource processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for resource handling, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Properties Maven Plugin for reading project properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for property management, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Git Commit ID Plugin for generating git properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for build information, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Frontend Maven Plugin for managing frontend build tools.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for frontend management, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Clean Maven Plugin for cleaning build artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition for build cleanup, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Sonar Maven Plugin group ID to org.sonarsource.scanner.maven.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old group ID is deprecated; using the new one ensures compatibility with current SonarQube scanners.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Eclipse M2E lifecycle mapping configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: This configuration is often unnecessary with modern IDEs and can be removed to simplify the POM.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove SortPom Maven Plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: This plugin is optional and can be removed if not strictly required for the build process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Gatling Maven Plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: This plugin is optional and can be removed if load testing is not part of the standard build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove MapStruct Processor Plugin configuration in favor of annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using annotation processor paths in the compiler plugin is the modern and recommended way to handle annotation processing in Maven.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin configuration to use Hibernate 5 naming strategies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 5 uses different naming strategies than Hibernate 4; updating the configuration ensures correct schema generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add contexts configuration to Liquibase plugin to exclude test contexts.
pom.xml.why_exists: This ensures that Liquibase does not apply changesets marked for test contexts during normal migrations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency convergence rule to Maven Enforcer Plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: This rule helps detect and resolve dependency conflicts, improving build stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer Plugin Java version requirement to support JDK 8 to 15.
pom.xml.why_exists: This ensures that the build enforces the correct Java version range for the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add WAR plugin configuration for web application packaging.
pom.xml.why_exists: This configuration is necessary for building WAR files with the correct structure and resources.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add resource filtering configuration for YAML files.
pom.xml.why_exists: This ensures that YAML configuration files are properly filtered during the build process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Tomcat with Undertow as the embedded web server in the production profile.
Replace Yeoman/Grunt frontend build with Webpack via frontend-maven-plugin in the production profile.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to clean the new static resource directory structure.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin build-info execution to generate Actuator build properties.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to capture git metadata during the build.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration for unit tests with alphabetical run order.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin configuration for integration tests with alphabetical run order.
Add sonar-maven-plugin for code quality analysis.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration with repackage goal and main class.
Add no-liquibase profile to allow skipping database migrations.
Add api-docs profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add tls profile to enable TLS configuration.
Add webpack profile to manage frontend build dependencies and execution.
Add dev profile with Undertow, devtools, and H2 database dependencies.
Add war profile to enable WAR file generation.
Add IDE profile to include MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies.
Add eclipse profile to configure m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add e2e profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x devtools properties are nested under `spring.devtools`.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
spring:
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**,.h2.server.properties
    livereload:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x Jackson properties are nested under `spring.jackson`.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x H2 console configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x H2 console properties are nested under `spring.h2.console`.
Spring Boot 2.x mail properties are nested under `spring.mail`.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
spring:
  mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: JHipster 6.x introduces new configuration namespaces for cache, CORS, and logging.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
jhipster:
  cache: # Cache configuration
    ehcache: # Ehcache configuration
      time-to-live-seconds: 3600 # By default objects stay 1 hour in the cache
      max-entries: 100 # Number of objects in each cache entry
  # CORS is only enabled by default with the "dev" profile, so BrowserSync can access the API
  cors:
    allowed-origins: '*'
    allowed-methods: '*'
    allowed-headers: '*'
    exposed-headers: 'Authorization,Link,X-Total-Count'
    allow-credentials: true
    max-age: 1800
  mail: # specific JHipster mail property, for standard properties see MailProperties
    base-url: http://127.0.0.1:8080
  logging:
    use-json-format: false # By default, logs are not in Json format
    logstash: # Forward logs to logstash over a socket, used by LoggingConfiguration
      enabled: false
      host: localhost
      port: 5000
      queue-size: 512

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add logging level configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    io.github.jhipster.sample: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add profile include configuration for API docs.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: JHipster 6.x uses profile includes for optional features like API docs.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
spring:
  profiles:
    active: dev
    include:
      - api-docs
      # Uncomment to activate TLS for the dev profile
      #- tls

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) replaced by Micrometer in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The legacy metrics properties (metrics.spark, metrics.graphite) are ignored or cause binding errors in Spring Boot 2.x which uses Micrometer.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific configuration properties for production profile.
Enable server compression and graceful shutdown in production.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
server:
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes default JPA behaviors (e.g., open-in-view, naming strategies); explicit configuration is often required to maintain compatibility or desired behavior.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x server and session configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses `server.servlet` namespace for servlet-specific settings; old `server.*` properties may be ignored or deprecated.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster specific application metadata and security audience configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x+ requires specific `jhipster` namespace properties for client app name and OAuth2 audience validation.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  clientApp:
    name: 'jhipsterOauth2SampleApplicationApp'
  security:
    oauth2:
      audience:
        - account
        - api://default
